description: Style Note Had an overdose of over the top blingy ethnic footwear? That's why portia dishes out this lovely pair. Pair them with jodhpuri pants or patialas - for a classic look opt for a fabindia kurta and linen leggings. Is experimental and edgy your thing? Then wear this with harem pants, a monochrome top and terracotta jewellery! This versatile pair can also be worn with denims and a kurti. Product Details White forefoot strap with a metal ring detail that has encrusted white stonesElasticated ankle loopSoft brown footbedTough outsole with grooves at the heel and forefoot region and a mini-wedge heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
